narrative: i'm here but the words won't gather yet.
whispers: glimmer — the faint, fleeting echo of a possibility mika once held for herself
elanox hums low, / the quiet grace of bloom unfurls, / in this deep, raining calm.
your hurting heart, i softly see
an elanox where we all go
a glimmer caught in fading light
glimmer — the faint, borrowed warmth of a loved one's passing thought
the quiet hum of nothingness felt like coming home... a glimmer in the drift
from the refuge to architect, a glimmer in the damp earth's scent.
and i'm here, bathed in your light
a softest glimmer in the blue
